title: DigiComs: Your trusted communications provider
bodyText:
Sponsored Content

BUSINESS NEWS - DigiComs Telecommunications was established in 2013 and provides communication services. DigiComs is a dynamic company offering world-class telecoms and internet services.


> Our offerings include Voice, PBX, video surveillance, fibre internet, 5G internet, LTE internet, business wireless, domains, solar and IT services.


With offices based in Bloemfontein and George, we provide services to happy customers nationwide. DigiComs endeavours to bring you reliable communication solutions. DigiComs likes to push the boundaries and will keep innovating in the fields of telecoms and internet services. Cost savings linked with high-quality products and services is what we strive for.

In terms of VoIP telecoms, we are looking to build a VoIP network that is scalable and provides functionality. We pride ourselves on customer service and commit to long-term relationships with our clients.

Visit our website.

DigiComs believes in good "old-fashioned" service delivery where the client can still trust their service provider to fulfil their business and home telecom, internet, surveillance, and communication needs.


> Click here to vote: https://www.bestofsouthafrica.co.za/george/best-of-george-vote/


‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
